prompt: Create a bold Swiss-modernist event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, portrait orientation, with a warm off-white paper background, stark black typography, and vivid red accent blocks. The composition is asymmetrical and editorial, with a strong grid and generous negative space. In the top left, place a small red uppercase line of text reading {argument name="date text" default="LIVE APRIL 27–30"}, followed by a thin horizontal black rule stretching toward the right. Below it, set an oversized stacked headline in ultra-bold black sans serif, left aligned, reading {argument name="headline text" default="The AI Web Design Sprint"}, broken across 4 lines with dramatic scale so the words dominate the left half of the poster. In the upper right quadrant, add 1 large solid red rectangle as a graphic block. Beneath that red block, place a compact black uppercase subhead in 3 lines: {argument name="tagline text" default="4 DAYS. REAL PROJECTS. SHIP TOGETHER."}. In the lower middle, include 2 cropped grayscale portrait photos of men from the chest up, side by side, documentary style, slightly overlapping the typography area; the left man has dark slicked-back hair and a short beard, the right man wears a dark baseball cap with embroidered lettering and has facial hair. Obscure both faces with 2 vertical soft-edged gray censor rectangles centered over each face. Along the right side, create a vertical feature column with 4 black square icons, each separated by thin horizontal divider lines and paired with uppercase labels. The 4 items are: a starburst icon with the label "CREATIVE COLLISION", a connected-nodes icon with the label "AI-POWERED WORKFLOWS", a code brackets icon with the label "CODE IN MOTION", and a terminal prompt icon with the label "REAL-TIME DESIGN". Near the bottom, add a full-width footer separated by a thin horizontal black rule. Inside the footer, create 4 text blocks divided by slim vertical lines: block 1 says "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD.", block 2 lists "MINIMAL PLAYGROUND & AGENCY 976" with a small red line beneath reading "LIVE ON THE WEB", block 3 lists "CYBERPUNK CAFE SURFERS (LATE SET)" and below it "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE" and then "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY", block 4 lists ticket info as "TICKETS $10 ADV $12 DOS". On the far lower right edge, add vertical red text reading {argument name="location text" default="CHICAGO, IL"}. Use a clean neo-grotesk typeface similar to Helvetica or Akzidenz-Grotesk, heavy weight for the headline, condensed uppercase for supporting text, crisp alignment, subtle paper texture, and a high-contrast black-red-cream palette. The overall look should feel like a contemporary design-conference poster mixed with punk tech culture and brutalist editorial branding.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张大胆的瑞士现代主义风格活动海报，用于 AI 与网页设计冲刺活动，采用纵向构图，背景为温暖的米白色纸张质感，搭配醒目的黑色排版和鲜艳的红色色块。构图采用不对称的编辑风格，具有强烈的网格感和充裕的留白。在左上角，放置一行红色小号大写文字 {argument name="date text" default="LIVE APRIL 27–30"}，随后是一条向右延伸的细黑色横线。下方设置超大号堆叠式标题，使用超粗体黑色无衬线字体，左对齐，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="The AI Web Design Sprint"}，分为 4 行排列，通过夸张的比例使文字占据海报左侧。在右上象限，添加 1 个大型实心红色矩形作为图形块。在该红色块下方，放置 3 行紧凑的黑色大写副标题：{argument name="tagline text" default="4 DAYS. REAL PROJECTS. SHIP TOGETHER."}。在底部中间，包含 2 张半身男士黑白肖像照，并排摆放，纪实风格，略微覆盖排版区域；左侧男子留着深色背头和短胡须，右侧男子戴着带有刺绣字母的深色棒球帽，留有胡须。用 2 个垂直的柔边灰色遮挡矩形遮住两人的面部，矩形居中于面部。沿右侧创建一列垂直功能栏，包含 4 个黑色方形图标，每个图标由细横线分隔，并配有大写标签。这 4 项内容为：星爆图标配标签 "CREATIVE COLLISION"，连接节点图标配标签 "AI-POWERED WORKFLOWS"，代码括号图标配标签 "CODE IN MOTION"，以及终端提示符图标配标签 "REAL-TIME DESIGN"。在底部附近，添加一个由细黑色横线分隔的全宽页脚。在页脚内，创建 4 个由细竖线分隔的文本块：第 1 块写着 "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD."，第 2 块列出 "MINIMAL PLAYGROUND & AGENCY 976" 并在下方配有一条红色短线，写着 "LIVE ON THE WEB"，第 3 块列出 "CYBERPUNK CAFE SURFERS (LATE SET)" 以及下方的 "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE" 和 "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY"，第 4 块列出票务信息 "TICKETS $10 ADV $12 DOS"。在最右下边缘，添加垂直的红色文字 {argument name="location text" default="CHICAGO, IL"}。使用类似于 Helvetica 或 Akzidenz-Grotesk 的简洁新怪诞体（Neo-grotesk），标题使用粗体，辅助文本使用压缩大写，对齐清晰，具有微妙的纸张纹理和高对比度的黑-红-米色调。整体视觉效果应融合当代设计会议海报、朋克科技文化与粗野主义编辑品牌风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: AI 网页设计冲刺活动瑞士风格海报：一款大胆的编辑风格活动海报，专为 AI 与网页设计冲刺活动设计，非常适合会议推广、创意科技活动及社交媒体宣传。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, grid, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
